summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AUREON institutional website for construction company. All major functionalities tested including navigation, portfolio filters, technical accordions, contact form, and backend APIs.
passed_tests: All navigation menu links (Início, Sobre, Serviços, Portfólio, Área Técnica, Contacto) work correctly
Hero section 'Pedir Orçamento' button scrolls to contact section
Hero section 'Ver Serviços' button scrolls to services section
Portfolio filters (Todos, Capoto, Microcimento) function properly - showing 12 total, 6 Capoto, 6 Microcimento projects
Portfolio lightbox opens and closes correctly when clicking project images
Technical section accordions (4 total) expand and collapse properly
Contact form accepts valid data and submits successfully
Contact form clears after successful submission
Success toast notification appears after form submission
WhatsApp button is visible and clickable
Backend API health endpoints (/ and /health) return 200 status
Portfolio retrieval API returns correct data
Portfolio filtering by featured status works
Individual project retrieval by ID works
Contact form submission API creates records successfully
Contact form validation rejects invalid data (422 status)
Error handling for non-existent resources (404 status)

success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All UI interactions and integrations working
